---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for GitPulse
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem It Solves

A clear description of the problem or limitation this feature would address.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this feature to work. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought of.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or references that help explain the feature.
